parameters.description: High-fidelity polymerases treated as acceptable choices for the GC-rich PCR task.

citations.authors: Cline J, Braman JC, Hogrefe HH
citations.title: PCR fidelity of pfu DNA polymerase and other thermostable DNA polymerases
citations.tier_justification: Peer-reviewed comparison showing the fidelity advantage of proofreading polymerases over Taq for PCR applications.

citations.title: Q5 High-Fidelity DNA Polymerase
citations.tier_justification: Authoritative vendor product page positioning Q5 as a high-fidelity polymerase with dedicated GC-rich support.

citations.title: Phusion High-Fidelity DNA Polymerase
citations.tier_justification: Authoritative vendor product page describing Phusion as a high-fidelity polymerase for demanding PCR applications.

parameters.description: Additives accepted as GC-rich PCR helpers in the LabCraft PCR task.

citations.authors: Henke W, Herdel K, Jung K, Schnorr D, Loening SA
citations.title: Betaine improves the PCR amplification of GC-rich DNA sequences
citations.tier_justification: Peer-reviewed GC-rich PCR study explicitly showing that betaine improves amplification of GC-rich targets.

citations.title: The enhancement of PCR amplification by low molecular-weight sulfones
citations.tier_justification: Peer-reviewed study on cosolvent enhancement for difficult PCR templates, supporting additive use for GC-rich amplification.

parameters.description: Extension-time range accepted for a difficult 2 kb amplicon with modern high-fidelity polymerases.

citations.title: PCR Using Q5 High-Fidelity DNA Polymerase
citations.tier_justification: Authoritative vendor protocol stating a 20-30 second per kb extension range for Q5, which corresponds to 40-60 seconds for the 2 kb PCR-01 target.

citations.title: Phusion PCR Protocol
citations.tier_justification: Authoritative vendor protocol stating a 15-30 second per kb extension range for Phusion, consistent with a 40-60 second window for a difficult 2 kb target.

parameters.description: Recommended cycle-count range for the PCR-01 genomic DNA amplification task.

citations.title: Protocol for Q5 High-Fidelity 2X Master Mix
citations.tier_justification: Authoritative vendor protocol recommending roughly 25-35 cycles, with genomic amplifications commonly using the upper end of that range.

citations.title: Phusion PCR Protocol
citations.tier_justification: Authoritative vendor protocol using about 30-35 cycles for standard genomic PCR workflows.
